title: phyllagathis indica
intro: Phyllagathis indica, also known as the Indian phyllagathis or yellow root, is a plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phyllagathis indica include its potential to alleviate fever, treat skin conditions, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Phyllagathis indica include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
